title: Supreme Court constitutes two more bar council election tribunals headed by Justices Deepak Gupta and Hima Kohli
description: The Supreme Court on Monday constituted two new election tribunals headed by former Supreme Court Justices Deepak Gupta and Hima Kohli to adjudicate disputes arising from the ongoing State Bar Council elections.The order was passed by a bench of Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant and Justice Joymalya Bagchi in a batch of petitions challenging election disputes across various State Bar Councils.These two tribunals will be in addition to an already existing tribunal headed by Justice Sudhansh
